ARESLib - FTC 23247
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AlignToPoseCommand
A command that drives the robot to a target pose using independent X, Y, and theta PID controllers.
AllianceUtil
Utility for detecting and handling alliance color in FTC matches.
AnalogAbsoluteEncoderWrapper
 
AnalogInputWrapper
AnalogInputWrapper standard implementation.
AnalogSensorWrapper
AnalogSensorWrapper standard implementation.
AndroidDashboardBackend
Telemetry backend for logging data to FTC Dashboard via network packets.
AresAbsoluteEncoder
Extension of AresEncoder that adds support for absolute positioning.
AresAlert
Represents a hardware alert or state warning that can be displayed to the driver station.
AresAlert.AlertType
 
AresAnalogSensor
Hardware-agnostic interface for an analog sensor.
AresAsyncExecutor
A centralized executor service for offloading heavy, non-hardware compute (like Vision Processing or complex Odometry kinematics) off the main FTC thread.
AresAutoLogger
AdvantageKit-Style AutoLogger.
AresBatterySim
Battery Simulation Model for ARESLib.
AresColorSensor
Hardware-agnostic interface for an RGB-A color sensor (e.g., REV Color Sensor v3).
AresCommandOpMode
Base high-performance OpMode class for the ARESLib framework.
AresDiagnostics
Pre-match hardware diagnostics that automatically scans and verifies all registered hardware devices.
AresDigitalSensor
 
AresDistanceSensor
Hardware-agnostic interface for an analog or digital distance sensor.
AresDrivetrain
Common interface for all ARESLib drivetrain subsystems.
AresEncoder
Hardware-agnostic interface for an encoder.
AresFaultManager
Manages all active ALERTS and hardware faults, dispatching them to telemetry and providing haptic/visual feedback to the driver station.
AresGamepad
Wrapper around the FTC Gamepad providing WPILib-style Trigger bindings and pre-inverted stick axes (Up = positive Y).
AresHardwareFaultInjector
A simulation-only tool that allows unit tests (or manual telemetry overrides) to artificially inject catastrophic hardware failures, testing the RobotHealthTracker and the robot's physical drift response.
AresHardwareManager
Global manager for physical and simulated hardware environments in ARESLib.
AresHardwareManager.AresPowerInputs
Loggable structured representation of the global power status.
AresHardwarePoseEstimator
A highly specialized Pose Estimator designed exclusively for external hardware odometry boards (e.g.
AresIMU
Standardizes IMU fetching across native BNO055, generic REV Hub IMUs, or GoBilda Pinpoint.
AresLEDManager
Singleton manager to control visual feedback via REV Blinkin LED Driver.
AresLoggableInputs
Basic marker interface flag.
AresLoggerBackend
Interface representing a backend sink for telemetry data.
AresLogUploader
Background Daemon that scans for completed .wpilog files on the local filesystem or USB drive, checks for an active internet connection, and automatically uploads them to a GitHub Release endpoint.
AresMotor
Hardware-agnostic interface for a motor.
AresMotorModel
Standard predefined FTC motor and encoder models with their corresponding exact ticks per revolution (CPR).
AresOctoQuadDriver
AresOctoQuadDriver standard implementation.
AresOctoQuadSensor
Smart Adapter for the OctoQuad coprocessor.
AresOdometry
Hardware-agnostic interface for a 2D generic odometry source.
AresOdometry
Universal Odometry class that integrates ChassisSpeeds and Gyro angles to estimate the robot's Pose2d on the field.
AresOperatorInterface
Subsystem handling driver and operator input, including intelligent rumble feedback for faults and voltage sags.
AresPhysicsWorld
Singleton wrapper around the Dyn4j Physics World to manage physical bounds, robots, and DECODE game elements logically separated from internal controllers.
AresRevColorSensor
AresRevColorSensor standard implementation.
AresRobot
Global utility class representing robot state.
AresServo
Hardware-agnostic interface for a standard PWM Servo.
AresSimulator
High-performance backend orchestrator for decoupled physics constraints.
AresSrsColorSensor
AresSrsColorSensor standard implementation.
AresSrsSensor
Smart Adapter for the SRS Hub coprocessor.
AresSystemCheckOpMode
Abstract base OpMode for running standardized pre-match hardware system checks.
AresTelemetry
Global telemetry distribution hub.
AresVisionSubsystem
Core vision subsystem that wraps a VisionIO interface to provide validated AprilTag-derived pose estimates and configurable confidence scoring.
ArmFeedforward
A helper class that computes feedforward outputs for a simple arm (single-joint, rotating mechanism).
ArrayLidarIO
AdvantageKit-style IO abstraction for a Time-of-Flight (ToF) array lidar sensor.
ArrayLidarIO.ArrayLidarInputs
Loggable data object containing the zones from the Lidar array.
ArrayLidarIOSim
 
ArrayLidarIOSrs
ArrayLidarIOSrs standard implementation.
ArrayVisionIOSim
ArrayVisionIOSim standard implementation.
AutoBuilder
A fluent builder for constructing autonomous command sequences.
AutoBuilder
Utility class used to build auto routines
AutoBuilder.QuadFunction<In1,In2,In3,In4,Out>
Functional interface for a function that takes 4 inputs
AutoBuilder.TriFunction<In1,In2,In3,Out>
Functional interface for a function that takes 3 inputs
AutoBuilderException
An exception while building autos
BangBangController
Implements a bang-bang controller, which outputs either full power or no power based on whether the measurement is below the setpoint.
BooleanConsumer
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
BuildConstants
Automatically generated file containing build version information.
ChassisSpeeds
Represents the speed of a robot chassis.
ChassisSpeedsRateLimiter
ChassisSpeedsRateLimiter standard implementation.
Command
A state machine representing a complete action to be performed by the robot.
Commands
A dummy implementation of the WPILib Commands factory.
CommandScheduler
The scheduler responsible for running Commands.
CommandUtil
Utility class for building commands used in autos
ConditionalCommand
A command that runs one of two commands depending on the evaluation of a given condition when this command is initialized.
ConstraintsZone
A zone on a path with different kinematic constraints
ContinuousSysIdTuner
Continuous System Identification Tuner.
ControllerModeExample
EXAMPLE: Operational modes for robot control, inspired by elite FRC team architectures.
ControllerModeManagerExample
EXAMPLE: Manages robot operational modes using state machine pattern.
CoordinateUtil
Utility functions for coordinate conversions, interpolation, and geometry scaling used within the ARESLib framework.
CRServoWrapper
CRServoWrapper standard implementation.
DcMotorExWrapper
Standard implementation mapping FTC Hardware directly to internal physics logic.
Debouncer
A simple boolean filter that prevents repetitive, noisy triggers.
Debouncer.DebounceType
 
DecodeFieldSim
Procedural generation of the DECODE (2025-2026 FTC Game) field elements.
DiagnosticsCommand
A Command that continuously runs pre-match hardware diagnostics during the init_loop phase.
DifferentialDriveIO
AdvantageKit-style hardware abstraction interface for a Differential (Tank) Drivetrain.
DifferentialDriveIO.DifferentialDriveInputs
Data object containing all inputs retrieved from the physical or simulated differential drive motors.
DifferentialDriveIOReal
Concrete implementation of DifferentialDriveIO for physical robot hardware.
DifferentialDriveIOSim
Simulated implementation of DifferentialDriveIO for offline physics testing.
DifferentialDriveKinematics
Differential Drive Kinematics solver.
DifferentialDriveOdometry
 
DifferentialDrivePoseEstimator
A sophisticated pose estimator for Differential Drives mirroring elite algorithms (WPILib 2024).
DifferentialDriveSubsystem
AdvantageKit-style Differential Drive Subsystem.
DifferentialDriveSubsystem.Config
Configuration data class for the DifferentialDriveSubsystem.
DifferentialDriveWheelPositions
Represents the wheel positions for a differential drive drivetrain.
DifferentialDriveWheelSpeeds
DifferentialDriveWheelSpeeds standard implementation.
DigitalSensorWrapper
DigitalSensorWrapper standard implementation.
DoubleArrayPublisher
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
DoublePublisher
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
DriverStation
A dummy implementation of the WPILib DriverStation.
DriverStation.Alliance
Dummy representation of an FRC Alliance color.
ElevatorFeedforward
A helper class that computes feedforward outputs for a simple elevator (vertical mechanism).
EliteShooterMath
Advanced Shot-On-The-Move mathematical solver ingested from Team 254 (2024).
EliteShooterMath.EliteShooterSetpoint
Data class for holding calculated shot parameters.
EventMarker
Position along the path that will trigger a command when reached
FaultMonitor
Interface that hardware components can implement to self-report faults to the global RobotHealthTracker subsystem.
FieldConstants
Centralized field boundary constants for the FTC competition environment.
FieldConstants.Alliance
Driver alliance selector for field-centric heading offset.
Filesystem
 
FlywheelIO
IO interface template for a flywheel mechanism (shooters, rollers, spinners).
FlywheelIO.Inputs
Logged inputs for a flywheel mechanism.
FlywheelIOSim
Simulation implementation of FlywheelIO for desktop testing.
FollowPathCommand
Base command for following a path
FollowPathHolonomic
Follow a path using a PPHolonomicDriveController
FollowPathLTV
 
FollowPathRamsete
 
FRCNetComm
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
FRCNetComm.Instances
 
FRCNetComm.ResourceType
 
FrustumVisualizer
Frustum Visualizer for AdvantageScope 3D telemetry.
FunctionalCommand
 
GenericEntry
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
GenericPublisher
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
GeometryUtil
Utility class for various geometry functions used during generation
GoalEndState
Describes the goal end state of the robot when finishing a path
HeadingLockCommand
A command that stabilizes the robot's heading when the driver isn't actively rotating.
HolonomicPathFollowerConfig
Configuration for the holonomic path following commands
IMUIO
AdvantageKit-style IO abstraction for IMU units (Inertial Measurement Units).
IMUIO.IMUInputs
 
InstantCommand
A Command that runs instantly; it will initialize, execute once, and finish immediately.
IntakeSimulation
Simulates a hardware intake mathematically registering overlapping game elements.
Interpolatable<T>
An interface for objects that can be interpolated between each other.
InterpolatingTreeMap<K extends Number,V extends Interpolatable<V>>
A TreeMap that automatically interpolates between values if the exact key is not found.
InverseMatrixHelper
Utility for performing standard matrix operations specifically tailored for drivetrain kinematics, like Cramer's Rule inversions.
KalmanFilter1D
A lightweight, dependency-free 1-Dimensional Kalman Filter for state tracking.
KinematicAiming
Utility for "Shoot-On-The-Move" kinematic aiming.
KinematicAiming.AimResult
The result of a kinematic aiming calculation.
LEDState
Standardized semantic states for robot visual feedback.
LimelightVisionWrapper
 
LinearFilter
This class implements a linear, time-invariant filter.
LinearMechanismIO
IO interface template for a linear mechanism (elevators, slides, lifts).
LinearMechanismIO.Inputs
Logged inputs for a linear mechanism.
LinearMechanismIOSim
Simulation implementation of LinearMechanismIO for desktop testing.
LocalADStar
Implementation of AD* running locally in a background thread
LocalADStar.GridPosition
Represents a node in the pathfinding grid
MatchTimerCommand
A Command that tracks elapsed match time and publishes it to telemetry.
MathSharedStore
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
MathUtil
Standard utility class for mathematically clamping values, wrapping angles, and applying deadbands.
MecanumDriveIO
AdvantageKit-style hardware abstraction interface for a Mecanum Drivetrain.
MecanumDriveIO.MecanumDriveInputs
Loggable data object containing the state of all four mecanum wheel pods.
MecanumDriveIOReal
Concrete implementation of MecanumDriveIO for physical robot hardware.
MecanumDriveIOSim
Simulated implementation of MecanumDriveIO for offline physics testing.
MecanumDriveKinematics
Mecanum Drive Kinematics solver.
MecanumDriveOdometry
 
MecanumDrivePoseEstimator
A sophisticated pose estimator for Mecanum Drives mirroring elite algorithms (WPILib 2024).
MecanumDriveSubsystem
AdvantageKit-style Mecanum Drive Subsystem.
MecanumDriveSubsystem.Config
Configuration data class for the MecanumDriveSubsystem.
MecanumDriveWheelPositions
MecanumDriveWheelPositions standard implementation.
MecanumDriveWheelSpeeds
MecanumDriveWheelSpeeds standard implementation.
MedianFilter
A class that implements a moving-window median filter.
N2
N2 standard implementation.
N3
N3 standard implementation.
NamedCommands
Utility class for managing named commands
NetworkTable
A dummy NetworkTable to allow PathPlanner configuration without NT4 dependencies.
NetworkTableEntry
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
NetworkTableEvent
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
NetworkTableEvent.Kind
 
NetworkTableInstance
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
NetworkTableListener
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
OctoMode
OctoMode standard implementation.
OctoQuadEncoderWrapper
Optional Wrapper for the DigitalChickenLabs OctoQuad driver using reflection.
OctoQuadFWv3
 
OctoQuadFWv3.ChannelBankConfig
 
OctoQuadFWv3.ChannelPulseWidthParams
A data block containing minimum and maximum pulse widths to be applied to a channel using OctoQuadFWv3.setSingleChannelPulseWidthParams(int, ChannelPulseWidthParams)
OctoQuadFWv3.EncoderDataBlock
A data block holding ALL encoder data; this block may be bulk read in one I2C operation.
OctoQuadFWv3.EncoderDirection
Allows reversing an encoder channel internally on the OctoQuad.
OctoQuadFWv3.FirmwareVersion
 
OctoQuadFWv3.I2cRecoveryMode
 
OctoQuadFWv3.LocalizerDataBlock
A data block holding ALL localizer data needed for navigation; this block may be bulk read in one I2C read operation.
OctoQuadFWv3.LocalizerStatus
Enum representing the status of the absolute localizer algorithm You can poll this to determine when IMU calibration has finished.
OctoQuadFWv3.LocalizerYawAxis
The absolute localizer automagically selects the appropriate axis on the IMU to use for yaw, regardless of physical mounting orientation.
OctoQuadFWv3.OctoQuadException
 
OctoQuadV1Impl
OctoQuadV1Impl standard implementation.
OctoQuadV2Impl
OctoQuadV2Impl standard implementation.
OdometryIO
AdvantageKit-style IO abstraction for Odometry systems (e.g., SparkFun OTOS, GoBilda Pinpoint, or PathPlanner localizers).
OdometryIO.OdometryInputs
Loggable data object containing generic odometry state.
OtosOdometryWrapper
OtosOdometryWrapper standard implementation.
Pair<A,B>
Pair standard implementation.
ParallelCommandGroup
A CommandGroup that runs a set of commands in parallel, ending when the last command ends.
ParallelDeadlineGroup
A CommandGroup that runs a set of commands in parallel, ending only when a specific command (the "deadline") ends, interrupting all other commands that are still running at that point.
ParallelRaceGroup
A CommandGroup that runs a set of commands in parallel, ending when any one of the commands ends and interrupting all the others.
PathConstraints
Kinematic path following constraints
Pathfinder
Interface for a pathfinder that can be used by PPLib's pathfinding commands
PathfindHolonomic
Pathfind and follow the path with a PPHolonomicDriveController
Pathfinding
Static class for interacting with the chosen pathfinding implementation from the pathfinding commands
PathfindingCommand
Base pathfinding command
PathfindLTV
 
PathfindRamsete
 
PathfindThenFollowPathHolonomic
A command group that first pathfinds to a goal path and then follows the goal path.
PathfindThenFollowPathLTV
A command group that first pathfinds to a goal path and then follows the goal path.
PathfindThenFollowPathRamsete
A command group that first pathfinds to a goal path and then follows the goal path.
PathFollowingController
Interface used by path following controllers
PathPlannerAuto
A command that loads and runs an autonomous routine built using PathPlanner.
PathPlannerLogging
Utility class for handling custom logging callbacks
PathPlannerPath
A PathPlanner path.
PathPlannerTrajectory
Trajectory created from a pathplanner path
PathPlannerTrajectory.State
A state along the trajectory
PathPoint
A point along a pathplanner path
PathSegment
A bezier curve segment
PhotonCore
 
PhotonCore.ExperimentalParameters
 
PhotonLynxModule
A customized LynxModule implementation for intercepting and routing LynxCommands through the PhotonCore parallel transmission pipeline to optimize FTC hardware loop times.
PIDConstants
PID constants used to create PID controllers
PIDController
Basic PID Controller.
PinpointOdometryWrapper
An optional wrapper for the GoBilda Pinpoint driver.
Pose2d
Represents a 2D pose containing translational and rotational elements.
Pose3d
A 3D pose consisting of a 3D translation and a 3D rotation.
PPHolonomicDriveController
Path following controller for holonomic drive trains
PPLibTelemetry
PPLibTelemetry standard implementation.
PrintCommand
A command that prints a string to standard output when initialized.
ProfiledPIDController
A PID Controller configured to follow a Trapezoidal Motion Profile.
ProjectileSimulation
Mathematically pseudo-simulates a 3D projectile launched from a robot.
ReflectionUtils
 
ReplanningConfig
Configuration for path replanning
ReplayAutoLogger
Replay-Mode AdvantageKit-Style Logger.
RevDistanceSensorWrapper
RevDistanceSensorWrapper standard implementation.
RevEncoderWrapper
Wrapper for the REV Through Bore Encoder used in Absolute Mode (PWM).
RevEncoderWrapper.EncoderVersion
 
RevIMUWrapper
 
RlogServerBackend
Socket-based real-time telemetry streaming backend.
RobotBase
A dummy RobotBase mocking execution modes.
RobotHealthTracker
Global singleton subsystem that continuously checks for hardware faults across all registered FaultMonitor devices and blasts them to both AdvantageScope telemetry AND the AresFaultManager alert system (which provides gamepad rumble and LED feedback).
RotaryMechanismIO
IO interface template for a rotary mechanism (arms, wrists, pivots, turrets).
RotaryMechanismIO.Inputs
Logged inputs for a rotary mechanism.
RotaryMechanismIOSim
Simulation implementation of RotaryMechanismIO for desktop testing.
Rotation2d
A rotation in a 2D coordinate frame represented a point on the unit circle (cosine and sine).
Rotation3d
A rotation in 3D space represented by a unit quaternion (w + xi + yj + zk).
RotationTarget
A target holonomic rotation at a position along a path
RunCommand
A command that runs a Runnable continuously.
SelectCommand<K>
A command that runs one command from a map of commands based on a key evaluator.
Sendable
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
SendableBuilder
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
SendableChooser<V>
 
SequentialCommandGroup
A CommandGroup that runs a list of commands in sequence.
ServoWrapper
ServoWrapper standard implementation.
ShootOnTheMoveCommand
A Command that continually feeds instantaneous robot velocities to a kinematic calculator, yielding a dynamically updated target-leading angle for a shooter or turret to track.
SimpleIntakeSubsystem
STARTER TEMPLATE: Simple intake subsystem with one motor and one sensor.
SimpleIntakeSubsystem.IntakeIO
 
SimpleIntakeSubsystem.IntakeIO.IntakeInputs
Container for sensor readings.
SimpleIntakeSubsystem.IntakeIOSim
 
SimpleIntakeSubsystem.IntakeState
 
SimpleMotorFeedforward
A simple feedforward model for a motor, containing static, velocity, and acceleration terms.
SlewRateLimiter
A class that limits the rate of change of an input value.
SmartDashboard
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
SOTMSolver
Shoot-On-The-Move (SOTM) Solver.
SRSHub
 
SRSHub.AnalogDigitalDevice
 
SRSHub.APDS9151
 
SRSHub.Command
 
SRSHub.Config
 
SRSHub.Encoder
 
SRSHub.GoBildaPinpoint
 
SRSHub.GoBildaPinpoint.EncoderDirection
 
SRSHub.GoBildaPinpoint.ResetIMUCommand
 
SRSHub.GoBildaPinpoint.SetPositionCommand
 
SRSHub.I2CDevice
 
SRSHub.PosVel
 
SRSHub.VL53L0X
 
SRSHub.VL53L5CX
 
SRSHub.VL53L5CX.Resolution
 
SrsHubEncoderWrapper
Optional Wrapper for the SRSHub driver using reflection.
SrsMode
SrsMode standard implementation.
StateGraphExporter
Utility to export an ARESLib StateMachine's validated transition table to a Markdown file containing a Mermaid-JS state diagram.
StateMachine<S extends Enum<S>>
A lightweight, enum-based finite state machine for managing subsystem complexity.
StructArrayPublisher
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
StructPublisher
A dummy shim implementation to allow PathPlanner compilation without native WPILib/Android dependencies.
Subsystem
A robot subsystem.
SubsystemBase
A base for subsystems that provides a more intuitive class hierarchy.
SwerveDriveKinematics
Helper class that converts a chassis velocity (dx, dy, and dtheta components) into individual module states and vice versa.
SwerveDriveOdometry
Class for swerve drive odometry.
SwerveDrivePoseEstimator
A sophisticated pose estimator for Swerve Drives mirroring elite algorithms (WPILib 2024).
SwerveDriveSubsystem
SwerveDriveSubsystem standard implementation.
SwerveDriveSubsystem.Config
Configuration data class for the SwerveDriveSubsystem.
SwerveModuleIO
AdvantageKit-style hardware abstraction interface for a single Swerve Module.
SwerveModuleIO.SwerveModuleInputs
Loggable data object containing the state of a single swerve wheel pod.
SwerveModuleIOReal
Concrete implementation of SwerveModuleIO for physical robot hardware.
SwerveModuleIOSim
Simulated implementation of SwerveModuleIO for offline physics testing.
SwerveModulePosition
Represents the state of one swerve module relating to its distance and angle.
SwerveModuleState
Represents the state of one swerve module.
SysIdCommand
The executing state machine that applies exact voltage over time and logs the mechanism's instantaneous state in the official WPILib `SysId` format.
SysIdJSONExporter
Automatically intercepts WPILib-style SysId routine data and serializes it strictly to the official `sysid-tool` JSON format.
SysIdJSONExporter.TestRecord
 
SysIdRoutine
An orchestrator object for WPILib-style System Identification (SysId).
SysIdRoutine.Config
Configuration for the generated tests.
SysIdRoutine.Direction
The direction of the motor test.
SysIdRoutine.Mechanism
Binds the mechanism IO specifically for testing.
TeleopDriveMath
Teleop drive math utilities for processing raw joystick inputs into smooth, predictable robot motion.
TimeInterpolatableBuffer<T extends Interpolatable<T>>
A buffer that stores a history of objects that implement Interpolatable.
Timer
A dummy implementation of the WPILib Timer class to ensure compatibility with PathPlanner without requiring the full WPILib HAL or Android runtime.
TractionControlLimiter
Advanced 2D Slew Rate Limiter to prevent carpet/tile slippage and odometry drift.
Transform2d
Represents a transformation for a Pose2d in the cartesian coordinate plane.
Transform3d
A 3D spatial transform consisting of a translation and rotation offset.
Translation2d
Represents a translation in 2D space.
Translation3d
A 3D translation (vector) with x, y, and z components in meters.
TrapezoidProfile
A standalone trapezoidal motion profile generator, decoupled from any PID controller.
TrapezoidProfile
A dummy TrapezoidProfile fallback implementation since ARESLib relies on native math profiles.
TrapezoidProfile.Constraints
Kinematic constraints for the profile.
TrapezoidProfile.Constraints
 
TrapezoidProfile.State
A state along the profile (position + velocity at a point in time).
TrapezoidProfile.State
 
Trigger
A class used to bind command execution to a boolean condition (such as a gamepad button press).
TunableNumber
A runtime-tunable number backed by FTC Dashboard for live PID tuning.
Twist2d
A change in distance along an arc since the last pose update.
Units
Utility class for common unit conversions used in FTC robotics.
VecBuilder
 
Vector<N>
Vector standard implementation.
VisionFusionHelper
Shared latency-compensating vision fusion logic used by all Pose Estimators.
VisionIO
AdvantageKit-style IO abstraction for robust vision processing.
VisionIO.VisionInputs
Loggable data object containing vision processing state, including target offsets and 3D pose estimates.
VisionIOSim
Simulated implementation of VisionIO for offline AprilTag testing.
VisionIOSim.Config
Configuration for VisionIOSim behavior.
WaitCommand
A command that does nothing but takes a specified amount of time to finish.
WpiLogBackend
Backend for logging telemetry directly to a .wpilog file.
WpiLogReader
Native Java parser for standard WPILog formatted files.
WpiLogReader.LogEntry
